title: Sarepta Therapeutics Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts - Comprehensive Analysis
text:
Sarepta Therapeutics (SRPT) analyst coverage shows mixed sentiment reflecting recent regulatory challenges and market conditions. A total of 25 analysts covering the company maintain a consensus rating of Hold with an average price target of $25.24, representing a 45.48% potential increase from certain price levels.

Analyst Rating Breakdown: Buy Ratings: 8. Hold Ratings: 27. Sell Ratings: 10. This distribution shows a relatively balanced market view with modest bias toward holding the position.

Earnings and Revenue Estimates: Consensus EPS estimate for next earnings: $1.00 USD. Consensus revenue estimate: $484.21 million USD. These estimates reflect expectations for continued revenue growth despite recent headwinds.

Price Target Information: Average price target: $25.24 USD. This forecasts approximately 45.48% increase in stock price, though analyst sentiment has become more cautious recently.

Growth Forecasts: Sarepta's revenue is forecast to decline at 11% per annum, reflecting market concerns about ELEVIDYS demand. Annual earnings expected to grow at 51.2% per year. EPS expected to grow by 51.2% per annum, suggesting improving profitability trends.

Recent Analyst Actions: Recent upgrades and downgrades have reflected market volatility. Last upgrade happened on November 5, 2025, when Mizuho raised their price target. Multiple downgrades occurred following July 2025 FDA regulatory actions and November trial failures.

Full-Year Guidance: Company maintains full-year 2026 guidance targeting net product revenue of $1.2 - $1.4 billion, compared to analyst consensus estimate of $1.77 billion for total revenues.
